title: Known Issue – Decimal Input
description: The issue where decimal input was not possible has been identified. A fix is currently being developed and an app update will be released soon. Apologies for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience.

title: Lost data after updating?
description: Did you lose data after updating the app? Please email software@collette.contact for assistance. Important: Do not delete the app, otherwise the data may be permanently lost.
